# Geobody Extraction

**Summary**: The process of identifying and isolating specific geological bodies from seismic data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] performed geobody-extraction to isolate stratigraphic traps for volumetric estimation.
